title: Holiday Whimsy
description: Combines "Christmas Elf Golem", "Candy Cane Fun", and "Dog Sweaters"
body: This pack combines my previous ones, "Christmas Elf Golem","Candy Cane Fun", and "Dog Sweaters". If I create more holiday textures in the future, I may add them here as well. Copper golems are turned into elves, sugar cane and bamboo are turned into candy canes, and dog armor turns into customizable sweaters. See individual packs for more pics.
